positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast celestial tapestry design featuring abstract planetary rings, stylized constellations, and nebulae gradients. The main element is a central stylized moon surrounded by repeating geometric arc patterns inspired by mandalas and cosmic dust trails. Use a deep indigo and vibrant cyan color palette with accents of metallic gold linework. The overall style must be clean, detailed vector illustration combined with neo-tribal graphic elements, emphasizing bold silhouettes and strong contrast for textile printing. Perfect central composition, suitable for an apparel chest print.
